warnings: All entries are proposed eval candidates. EVL is the canonical owner; this artifact does not adopt, schedule, or run any eval.
Acceptance conditions are recommendations to EVL; final acceptance criteria are EVL's to set.
failure_prevented: Eval coverage gaps remaining unnamed and unowned across loops; the same partial-coverage failure mode recurring without any eval candidate ever being proposed.
signal_improved: Each named failure mode or leverage item has at least one proposed eval candidate with explicit input artifacts and acceptance condition recommendation, ready for EVL review.

candidates.title: Long-horizon replay coverage eval candidate
candidates.purpose: Detect drift that escapes short-horizon replay by requiring a long-horizon replay dimension before EVL declares coverage_status=full.
candidates.failure_prevented: FM-SEED-EVAL-GAP recurring with no signal to EVL that long_horizon_replay was missing.
candidates.signal_improved: EVL coverage_status reflects long-horizon replay presence and quality.
candidates.expected_signal: EVL replay coverage includes long_horizon dimension with pass/partial/fail and source_artifacts_used.
candidates.acceptance_condition: EVL artifact reports long_horizon dimension with status and source; absent signal becomes warn rather than missing-by-default.

candidates.title: Full certification set evidence-coverage eval candidate
candidates.purpose: Require the certification evidence set used by SEL to appear in eval inputs so coverage_status=partial cannot stay invisible to downstream gates.
candidates.failure_prevented: FM-SEED-CERT-INCOMPLETE leading to SEL observe-only with no eval candidate ever raising the missing certification inputs.
candidates.signal_improved: EVL evidence-coverage signal explicitly lists certification artifacts present and missing.
candidates.expected_signal: EVL artifact enumerates required certification inputs and per-input present/partial/missing status.
candidates.acceptance_condition: Missing certification inputs surface as named warnings; never silently absent.

candidates.title: REP long-horizon dimension evidence-coverage eval candidate
candidates.purpose: Require REP to expose long_horizon and distribution_shift dimensions in its replay record before EVL accepts replay coverage as complete.
candidates.failure_prevented: FM-SEED-REPLAY-GAP recurring with REP silently omitting long-horizon dimensions.
candidates.signal_improved: REP replay_record exposes per-dimension status and source.
candidates.expected_signal: REP record carries dimensions=[short_horizon, long_horizon, distribution_shift] with status and source per dimension.
candidates.acceptance_condition: Any missing dimension produces a named warning visible to EVL.

candidates.title: SLO budget-context evidence-coverage eval candidate
candidates.purpose: Require SLO record to expose consumed_ratio and budget_status alongside CDE inputs.
candidates.failure_prevented: FM-SEED-SLO-CONTEXT leaving budget context partial during promotion review.
candidates.signal_improved: SLO consumed_ratio and budget_status are first-class fields in the SLO record consumed by CDE.
candidates.expected_signal: SLO record includes consumed_ratio (float|unknown) and budget_status (within|warn|over|unknown).
candidates.acceptance_condition: Absent fields surface as 'unknown' with named warning, never as 0 or pass.

candidates.title: LIN trace completeness eval candidate
candidates.purpose: Require lineage record to link source_artifact_record, output_artifact_record, eval_summary_record, control_decision_record, and enforcement_action_record for every loop case.
candidates.failure_prevented: Cases shipping without an end-to-end lineage chain that EVL can reference for replay.
candidates.signal_improved: Lineage trace completeness becomes a named eval signal with explicit required edges.
candidates.expected_signal: LIN record explicitly enumerates required upstream/downstream edges and per-edge status.
candidates.acceptance_condition: Any missing edge produces a named warning visible to EVL.

candidates.title: Dashboard-truth eval candidate
candidates.purpose: Verify that /api/intelligence never substitutes 0 for a missing artifact field and never reports a fake-pass status.
candidates.failure_prevented: Dashboard reporting healthy state while an upstream artifact is missing or partial.
candidates.signal_improved: Dashboard-truth signal becomes auditable: every numeric field traces to an artifact or surfaces 'unknown'.
candidates.expected_signal: API responses preserve source_artifacts_used and degrade missing fields to 'unknown', never 0 or PASS.
candidates.acceptance_condition: Tests assert no fake-zero substitution and no banned authority vocabulary in MET-owned outputs.
